Our Platinum Sport cabin raises the bar for family travel with heated/ventilated massaging leather front seats, heated second-row seats, a power-folding third row, a heated-leather power steering wheel, and tri-zone automatic climate control. A high-tech haven from busy days, the interior further shows off with a 55-inch infotainment display, rear-seat entertainment, AKG audio, full-color navigation, wireless Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, Bluetooth, WiFi compatibility, and wireless charging. Compelling Cadillac safety cues like hands-free Super Cruise compatibility, a head-up display, a digital rearview camera, blind-spot assistance, lane-keeping assistance, automatic braking, HD surround vision, forward collision alert, and more help protect you as you go. With all that, our well-appointed Escalade Platinum Sport puts your family first! Save this Page and Call for Availability. We Know You Will Enjoy Your  Trucks Humble Test Drive Towards Ownership! We never cut any corners on our builds, which is why we only use top-quality name-brand products when building your Truck, SUV or Jeep. description: At Mid-Illini Auto Group, we believe your vehicle search and eventual purchase should be Simple, Straight Forward, and Hassle Free! We want you to own your vehicle, not your vehicle to own you. We eliminate the unnecessary (and annoying) back and forth negotiations many dealerships live by. With just 2,768 miles on the odometer, this Compass is practically brand new and ready to take you on your next adventure.  This Compass has been meticulously inspected and certified by our experienced technicians, ensuring it meets the highest standards of quality and reliability. You can drive with confidence knowing that this vehicle has been thoroughly evaluated and is ready to provide you with years of dependable service. If you're in the market for a capable and practical SUV or simply looking to upgrade your current ride, this 2026 Jeep Compass Limited is a must-see. Stop by our showroom today and experience the difference that Mid-Illini Auto Group can make in your vehicle purchasing journey. description: Luxury Auto Collection is pleased to offer this 2026 Mercedes-Benz G-Class AMG G 63.  No Accidents!  One Owner!    OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:  Seat Comfort PackageFront Ventilated SeatsRapid Heating Front SeatsDrive-Dynamic Multicontour Front Seats with MassageENERGIZING Package PlusExclusive Interior Package Plus ($7,400 value)Exclusive Nappa Leather TrimMANUFAKTUR Interior Package Plus    Convenience With the adaptive cruise control activated, the vehicle will use cameras and/or navigation data to automatically slow down for curves in the road ahead that may be too sharp for the current set speed. It will accelerate back to the set speed when the road straightens  and Security The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending forward collision. The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian. Steering assist and/or lane centering will maintain the vehicle's position within the lane with minimal input from the driver. The driver's hands must remain on the steering wheel, or touch the steering wheel every few seconds, for the system to remain  and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring      About Us Luxury Auto Collection is your premium source for luxury vehicles. Located in convenient sunny Scottsdale, AZ, we can ship vehicles wherever you are, from Los Angeles to Miami to Dallas, Chicago, Nashville, and beyond.  Luxury Auto Collection is proud to be active supporters of a number of Non-Profits and organizations we feel do a great job in giving back to the community we live in and care about.  Visit our website or contact us to find out more!  With you from A-Z When it comes time to fund your next luxury vehicle, our finance department has all the resources you need.
